news.title: Tesla Has Only 69 Robotaxis In Texas — But They Are Cheap
news.summary: Tesla Inc. is getting lapped in the Texas robotaxi race. The question is whether it matters. Texas Department of Motor Vehicles data as of June 16 puts Tesla’s statewide fleet at just 69 vehicles, according to research from Bank of America. Waymo leads with 620, AVRide has 317, Nuro and Zoox round out the field at 47 and 35. Tesla is also trails its competitors in markets. news.title: A SpaceX-Tesla Merger Could Manufacture A $5 Trillion Giant: Here's What Prediction Markets Say
news.summary: Elon Musk’s next move could be a SpaceX-Tesla merger big enough to challenge Nvidia Corp. for the title of most valuable company on Earth. Just three sessions into its IPO, SpaceX has already surged nearly 50% to roughly $2.6 trillion, leaving Tesla Inc. and its $1.5 trillion behind. The wider that gap runs, the cheaper Tesla gets to absorb, and the more control Musk keeps over whatever emerges.
